overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character exploring a cozy, underground common room with distinctive round architecture and warm lighting. The character moves from a circular dormitory bedroom through a tunnel corridor into a grand hall with wooden balconies, hanging plants, and other students.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dormitory bedroom with multiple beds

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular bedroom, examining the beds and furniture before heading toward the exit archway

entered.detail: large circular patterned rug covering the floor center
wooden bed with green bedding and carved headboard
stone dresser with mirror and potted plant on top
round window with sunlight streaming through
lit wall sconce with warm yellow glow

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy circular bedroom with a large woven rug at the center. Wooden beds with green bedding line the walls, illuminated by warm wall lamps and natural light from round windows. The character walks around the room, passing stone dressers and wardrobes before approaching the exit tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved corridor with exposed wooden ceiling beams

events.description: character enters the tunnel corridor from the bedroom
character opens the round metal door to enter the main common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the curved tunnel corridor toward the large ornate round door

entered.detail: arched wooden ceiling beams forming a tunnel shape
large circular metal door with intricate scrollwork designs
lit wall-mounted lantern with metal bracket
decorative carved stone patterns on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, curved corridor with exposed wooden ceiling beams and stone walls. Wall sconces provide warm lighting as the character approaches a large round metal door at the end of the tunnel. The door opens to reveal the main common room beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand common room with balconies and fireplace

events.description: entering the large common room from the tunnel corridor
passing under hanging plants and approaching the central fireplace area

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room, passing other students and approaching the fireplace and tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing near the entrance
student walking ahead toward the fireplace area

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and mantle
upper level wooden balconies with decorative railings
potted plants suspended from the ceiling in blue pots
dark round tunnel entrance at the far end of the room
decorative circular stone tile patterns on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand, high-ceilinged common room with wooden balconies, hanging plants, and a large stone fireplace. Other students are scattered throughout the space, some standing and conversing. The character walks across the patterned stone floor, passing under suspended plants and approaching a dark tunnel entrance at the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimacy of a private circular bedroom into the expansive scale of a grand underground common room. It begins by navigating a cozy dormitory space filled with woven rugs and wooden beds under the glow of warm wall lamps, moving past stone dressers toward a narrow exit. As the character enters a curved stone corridor, the space tightens under exposed wooden beams before the camera approaches a large round metal door. The scene then opens wide as the door swings inward, revealing a high-ceilinged hall characterized by wooden balconies, hanging plants, and a massive stone fireplace. Finally, the camera glides across the patterned stone floor past conversing students, moving toward a dark tunnel entrance at the far end of the hall.
